content.problemStatement:
Luna Lovegood found a mysterious locket in the Room of Requirement while searching for lost items. The locket has the power to influence the thoughts and actions of its possessor. Harry Potter wants to ensure that no one else has been influenced by this enchanted locket before Luna.

You are given a list of $N$ names of people who held the locket in sequence. For each person in the list, determine if they held the locket at any point before.
constraints:
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- All names consist of lower/upper case latin letters and their length don't exceed 10.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input contains an integer $N$ — names of people. 
- The next $N$ lines contain name of people - each one on separate line.
content.outputFormat:
For each name $s_{i}$ at the $i^{\text{th}}$ position in the list, output on separate line:
- Output `YES` if there exists an earlier position j (j < i) where $s_{j}$  = $s_{i}$.
- Otherwise, output `NO`.
